items.title: Sam Altman’s project World looks to scale its human verification empire. First stop: Tinder.

items.summary: World, which has raised eyebrows (but also a lot of interest) with its Orb-centered anonymous verification project, is looking to expand its influence via a bevy of new partnerships.

items.title: Kevin Weil and Bill Peebles exit OpenAI as company continues to shed ‘side quests’
items.title_zh: 随着公司继续放弃“支线任务” ， Kevin Weil和Bill Peebles退出OpenAI
items.summary: Kevin Weil and Bill Peebles are leaving OpenAI as the company shuts down Sora and folds its science team, signaling a sharp pivot away from consumer moonshots toward enterprise AI.

items.title: Man who hacked US Supreme Court filing system sentenced to probation

items.summary: Nicholas Moore hacked into three U.S. government networks using stolen credentials, and then bragged about it and posted victims' personal data on Instagram under the handle @ihackedthegovernment.

items.title_zh: 资料来源：随着企业增长激增， Cursor正在洽谈以500亿美元的估值筹集20亿美元以上的资金
items.summary: Returning backers a16z and Thrive are expected to lead the round.

items.title: ‘Tokenmaxxing’ is making developers less productive than they think
items.title_zh: “Tokenmaxxing”正在使开发人员的生产力低于他们的想象
items.summary: There's a lot more code — but it's a lot more expensive and requires a lot more rewriting.

items.title: Hackers are abusing unpatched Windows security flaws to hack into organizations
items.title_zh: 黑客滥用未修补的Windows安全漏洞入侵组织
items.summary: A security researcher published details of three security vulnerabilities in Windows Defender, and the code used to exploit them. Now, hackers are taking advantage of the vulnerabilities in real-life attacks, according to a cybersecurity firm.

items.title: Zoom teams up with World to verify humans in meetings
items.title_zh: Zoom与World合作，在会议中验证人类身份
items.summary: Meeting platform Zoom has announced a partnership with World, Sam Altman's human ID verification company, to ensure that the people attending meetings are actually human and not AI-generated imposters. Zoom will show a badge on verified participants' tile.

items.title: Gigs turns your concert history into a personal live music archive
items.title_zh: Gigs将您的音乐会历史记录转化为个人现场音乐档案
items.summary: New iPhone app Gigs uses AI to turn old tickets, screenshots, and emails into a personal concert archive with stats, memories, and more.

items.title: Chef Robotics escaped the robot cooking graveyard and says it’s thriving — here’s why
items.title_zh: Chef Robotics逃离了机器人烹饪墓地，并表示它正在蓬勃发展—这就是原因
items.summary: The company, which deploys AI-guided robot arms for food production, says it is looking to expand its services to provide for a broader array of customers.

items.title: Uber will now pick up your returns from your doorstep
items.title_zh: 现在，优步将为您取货
items.summary: The new returns feature is the company's latest effort to become an everything app. There are limitations to the new service, and there is, of course, a courier fee.

items.title: OpenAI’s former Sora boss is leaving
items.title_zh: OpenAI的前Sora老板即将离职
items.summary: Last month, OpenAI gave up on its Sora video generation tool, and on Friday, the Sora team's leader, Bill Peebles, announced that he is leaving the company. OpenAI has been shifting its priorities as part of an effort to avoid "side quests," and Peebles' departure is just one of many recent changes as the company […]

items.title: Should you stare into Sam Altman’s orb before your next date?
items.title_zh: 在下次约会之前，你应该盯着山姆·奥尔特曼的球体看吗？
items.summary: Tinder users who prove they're a real person by visiting an identity-verifying orb will soon be able to get five free boosts in the app - and it's just the latest service to embrace the orb. World, which was co-founded by OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, initially tested Tinder verification using its facial scanning orbs through […]

items.title: Anthropic’s new cybersecurity model could get it back in the government’s good graces
items.title_zh: Anthropic的新网络安全模式可能会让它重新受到政府的青睐
items.summary: The Trump administration has spent nearly two months fighting with AI company Anthropic. It's dubbed the company a "RADICAL LEFT, WOKE COMPANY" full of "Leftwing nut jobs" and a menace to national security. But some of the ice may reportedly be melting between the two, thanks to Anthropic's buzzy new cybersecurity-focused model: Claude Mythos Preview. […]

items.title: Betting on the news raises ethical questions for journalists
items.title_zh: 押注新闻会给记者带来道德问题
items.summary: Prediction market exchanges have created an environment where just about any piece of information is potentially monetizable: How well will BTS's new song perform this week? How hot will Los Angeles get? Will Donald Trump be impeached? Users can wager on all of that and, on some platforms, more gruesome and violent outcomes in the […]

items.title: This charming gadget writes bad AI poetry
items.title_zh: 这个迷人的小工具写了糟糕的人工智能诗歌
items.summary: I've never been as charmed and frustrated by one gadget as I have with the Poetry Camera. It's a delightful object. White and cherry red with a color-matched woven strap, it looks playful and adorably lo-fi. If I saw it on a store shelf, I'd absolutely pick it up. But aside from obviously appealing, I'm […]

items.title: Our new favorite budget phones
items.title_zh: 我们最喜爱的全新低价手机
items.summary: Over the last few months, every phone maker under the sun has refreshed its lineups, especially at the affordable end, with no major budget phone launches now expected until next year. That made it the perfect time to go back and reassess The Verge's recommendations for the best budget phones you can buy right now. […]

items.title: The best budget smartphones you can buy
items.title_zh: 您可以买到的最实惠的智能手机
items.summary: Some of us take a kind of “eat to live” rather than a “live to eat” approach to gadgets. They’re tools that help you get things done, not something you want to invest a lot of time or money in. If that’s you — and there’s no judgment here from a certifiable gadget nerd — […]

items.title: Dairy Queen is putting an AI chatbot in its drive-thrus
items.title_zh: Dairy Queen正在推出AI聊天机器人
items.summary: Dairy Queen is becoming the latest fast food chain to get in on AI, as it's bringing a chatbot to dozens of its drive-thrus across the US and Canada. It aims to help speed up drive-thru service and "encourage customers to add more food to their orders," according to The Wall Street Journal. Following a […]

items.title: The AirPods Pro 3 are $50 off right now, nearly matching their best-ever price

We’ve rounded up the best deals from the sale here, but one of the most notable is the AirPods Pro 3, which are down to $199.99 ($50 off) at Best Buy, […]

items.summary: Vacuum cleaners, personal massagers, electronic baby rockers, and walking pads: These are the secondhand machines Rachel Youn sources to create their kinetic sculptures. Made with artificial flowers, metal hardware, and these used electronic components, each one possesses a humanlike presence. Slow Burn is made from an artificial orchid, a neck massager, bits of metal that […]

items.title: Ceasefire with Israel brings respite to Lebanon, but obstacles to peace remain
items.title_zh: 与以色列的停火给黎巴嫩带来了喘息的机会，但和平的障碍依然存在
items.summary: The halt to weeks of fighting is being celebrated in Lebanon, but it will be difficult to ensure it lasts.

items.title: Irish fugitive and suspected crime boss Daniel Kinahan arrested in Dubai

items.summary: Bellarmine Mugabe was arrested in February following the shooting of a 23-year-old man at his home in Johannesburg.

items.title: Japan reveals new name for 40C-and-hotter days after blistering summer
items.title_zh: 日本在炎热的夏天之后揭示了40C和炎热天气的新名称
items.summary: The term - kokushobi - translates to "cruelly hot", "brutally hot" or "severely hot", and comes after Japan's hottest summer on record.

items.title: 'Mum is finally free!' Pensioner detained by ICE in US returns to France
items.title_zh: （妈妈终于自由了！ “在美国被ICE拘留的养老金领取者返回法国
items.summary: Marie-Thérèse had moved to the US after reuniting with her long-lost love, an American man who died in January.

items.summary: Hicham Harb is suspected of directing the attack in the Rue des Rosiers and acting as one of the gunmen who shot at diners.

items.title: Singer D4vd arrested on suspicion of murdering teenage girl
items.title_zh: 歌手D4vd因涉嫌谋杀少女被捕
items.summary: The remains of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez were found in the singer's car last year.

items.title: Política se mistura, mas não deve dominar o esporte
items.title_zh: 政治混合但不应主导这项运动
items.summary: Nesta semana, eu e dois amigos jornalistas esportivos começamos a debater sobre a seleção de futebol do Irã. Leia mais (04/18/2026 - 00h07)

items.title: Ex-presidente do BRB pode tentar correr com delação no caso Master
items.title_zh: 前BRB总裁可能会在主案件中试图以辩诉交易的方式竞选
items.summary: Preso na 4ª fase da operação Compliance Zero da Polícia Federal, Paulo Henrique Costa, o ex-presidente do BRB, pode agora ter incentivos para correr e fechar uma delação até mesmo antes de Daniel Vorcaro, dono do Master, que já assinou um acordo de confidencialidade para iniciar a colaboração. Leia mais (04/18/2026 - 00h03)

items.title: Marcelo Freixo reúne políticos e personalidades em lançamento de livro em SP
items.title_zh: 马塞洛·弗雷索（ Marcelo Freixo ）将政治家和知名人士聚集在一起，在SP
items.summary: O ex-deputado e ex-presidente da Embratur Marcelo Freixo e o jornalista Bruno Paes Manso receberam convidados, na noite de quinta (16), no lançamento do livro "Viver É Perigoso", no Bar do Manoel, em São Paulo. Leia mais (04/17/2026 - 23h59)

items.title: BBB 26: Ana Paula, Boneco e Milena se enfrentam no último paredão da temporada; vote na enquete
items.title_zh: BBB 26 ： Ana Paula、Boneco和Milena在本赛季的最后一场比赛中对决；在民意调查中投票
items.summary: Ana Paula Renault, Leandro Boneco e Milena Moreira se enfrentam no último paredão do BBB 26 (Globo) e um dos brothers será eliminado na noite de domingo (19). Leia mais (04/17/2026 - 23h21)

items.title: China cria regulamento que confronta sanções impostas pelos EUA
items.title_zh: 中国制定法规，应对美国实施的制裁
items.summary: Começou a valer na última segunda-feira (13) o Regulamento contra a Jurisdição Extraterritorial Indevida de Países Estrangeiros, uma normativa publicada por Pequim para limitar os efeitos das sanções unilaterais (especialmente aquelas promulgadas pelos Estados Unidos) em território nacional e sobre seus empreendimentos e interesses no exterior. Leia mais (04/17/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Maioria dos aliados de Lula que foi a favor do impeachment de Dilma evita o tema 10 anos depois
items.title_zh: 卢拉的大多数支持弹劾迪尔玛的盟友在10年后都回避了这个问题
items.summary: Poucos aliados do presidente Lula que foram a favor do impeachment da ex-presidente Dilma Rousseff em 2016 admitem arrependimento. Passados dez anos, o PT trata o episódio com pragmatismo na costura de palanques nos estados para as eleições de 2026, enquanto a maioria dos que votaram pela cassação evita tocar no assunto. Leia mais (04/17/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Autores reinventam livros de negócios com IA, áudio e interatividade
items.title_zh: 作者通过人工智能、音频和交互性重塑商业书籍
items.summary: Quando o autor de best-sellers de negócios e especialista em marketing Seth Godin começou a trabalhar em seu livro mais recente, "The Knot", ele buscou novas formas de engajar seus potenciais leitores. Leia mais (04/17/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Como é o Dinner in the Sky, que serve comida a 40 metros de altura no parque Cândido Portinari
items.title_zh: Cândido Portinari公园40米高的空中晚餐（ Dinner in the Sky ）怎么样？
items.summary: Comer a 40 metros do chão, sentado a uma mesa suspensa por um guindaste. Eis a proposta do Dinner in the Sky, experiência que voltou a São Paulo nesta sexta-feira (17), desta vez para uma temporada no parque Cândido Portinari, ao lado do Villa-Lobos, onde fica até 16 de agosto. Leia mais (04/17/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Master causou tensão do TCU ao STF e virou elefante grande demais para caber embaixo do tapete
items.title_zh: 师父从TCU到STF造成了张力，变成了大象太大，无法放在地毯下
items.summary: Na virada do ano, o ministro Dias Toffoli, do STF (Supremo Tribunal Federal), estava no resort Tayayá, no Paraná, para a festa de Réveillon de 2026. Leia mais (04/17/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Edifiício Martinelli anuncia programação mensal com shows de sertanejo
items.title_zh: Edifiício Martinelli通过sertanejo节目宣布每月时间表
items.summary: Conhecido por festas à noite no Centro Histórico da capital paulista, o Edifício Martinelli passa a integrar o sertanejo em sua programação. O evento Bagunçô tem estreia no dia 7 de maio, às 19h. Os ingressos já estão à venda na plataforma Sympla. Leia mais (04/17/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Kosovo, Bosnia troops prepared for Gaza peacekeeping role
items.title_zh: 科索沃、波斯尼亚部队为加沙维和角色做好准备
items.summary: Kosovo intends to send 22 members of the security forces, while Bosnia said more than 60 Bosnian soldiers are expected to join the peacekeeping force.

items.title: North Sumatra prepares bylaw on vape as it still tops drugs abuse
items.title_zh: 北苏门答腊制定电子烟附则，因为它仍然是药物滥用的首选
items.summary: One of the crucial points in the proposed bylaw is the new method in drugs distribution using liquid for e-cigarette or vape.

items.title: ‘Blueprint’: Meritocracy, pressure and the making of Indonesian engineers
items.title_zh: “蓝图” ：任人唯贤、压力和印尼工程师的塑造
items.summary: A narrative nonfiction account of 20 Indonesian engineers working across 120 countries reveals the reality behind meritocracy, where resilience, not reputation, determines who lasts.

items.title: Iran reopens Strait of Hormuz, but says US must end naval blockade
items.title_zh: 伊朗重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，但表示美国必须结束海上封锁
items.summary: Subsequent statements and clarifications from both sides left uncertainty over how quickly shipping might return to normal, and some vessels could be observed making unsuccessful attempts cross the strait on Friday before turning back.

items.title: Analysis: IDX, OJK to restore investor confidence ahead of MSCI review
items.title_zh: 分析： IDX、OJK在MSCI审查前恢复投资者信心
items.summary: The Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) enacted a new provision setting the minimum free float requirement at 15 percent for both listed companies and prospective issuers, doubling the previous threshold of 7.5 percent. This change was made in response to concerns raised by MSCI regarding the low free float levels of Indonesian equities, which led the index to freeze Indonesia’s inclusion in its indices in February and March. These measures are being implemented to demonstrate regulatory compliance ahead of MSCI’s May index 2026 review.

items.title: Energy jitters drive EV sales in Indonesia to nearly double
items.title_zh: 能源紧张推动印尼电动汽车销量增长近一倍
items.summary: However, some prospective buyers said they may hold off on purchasing an EV if incentives are reduced.

items.title: Indonesian haj departures on track amid Middle East war
items.title_zh: 中东战争期间印尼朝觐启程
items.summary: Indonesia’s haj departures remain on track despite the ongoing United States-Israeli war against Iran, with preparations entering the final stage and the first group of pilgrims set to leave on April 22 as authorities press ahead with safety measures.

items.title: Indonesia secures Russian crude imports, minister says
items.title_zh: 部长说，印度尼西亚确保俄罗斯原油进口
items.summary: The government has announced that Indonesia will soon begin importing crude oil from Russia as part of a broader strategy to diversify energy supplies.

items.title: Eight bodies recovered after Kalimantan helicopter crash
items.title_zh: 加里曼丹直升机坠毁后发现8具尸体
items.summary: A joint search and rescue team has recovered all eight bodies of those involved in a helicopter crash in the dense forests of West Kalimantan, confirming that there were no survivors after hours of evacuation efforts in difficult, steep terrain on Thursday night.

items.title: Hegseth says US forces ready to restart combat if Iran doesn't agree a deal
items.title_zh: 黑格塞斯表示，如果伊朗不同意协议，美军准备重启战斗
items.summary: Hegseth also said the US will blockade Iranian ports for "as long as it takes."

items.title: Russian oil sanctions: US extends waiver for cargoes already at sea
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯石油制裁：美国延长对已在海上的货物的豁免
items.summary: The US Treasury Department has issued a new license extending a waiver for global buyers to purchase Russian oil shipments already at sea until May 16. This decision reverses earlier statements and aims to manage energy market volatility, despite criticism from lawmakers who argue it supports economies engaged in conflicts.

items.title: Will Iran give up its uranium? Trump says yes, Tehran says no
items.title_zh: 伊朗会放弃铀吗？特朗普说是，德黑兰说不是

items.title: Bumrah loses cool, hurls run-up marker in frustration amid horror run - WATCH
items.title_zh: Bumrah失去了冷静，在恐怖的跑步中沮丧地投掷跑步标记-观看
items.summary: Jasprit Bumrah is experiencing an uncharacteristic lean patch in IPL 2026, failing to pick up a wicket in five matches. Former India cricketer Irfan Pathan suggests Bumrah's excessive use of slower deliveries, accounting for 44% of his bowling, is impacting his effectiveness. Pathan advises increasing pace and reducing slower ball percentage for better results.

items.title: TCS Nashik case: Cops reach Mumbai in search of TCS staffer, question her husband
items.title_zh: TCS Nashik案件：警察到达孟买寻找TCS工作人员，质疑她的丈夫
items.summary: Nashik Crime Branch is searching for a 26-year-old TCS employee in Mumbra, Thane, accused of religious harassment. Her husband, questioned by police, stated she returned to Nashik. The woman, reportedly pregnant, is seeking anticipatory bail. The National Commission for Women has formed a fact-finding committee to investigate the allegations.

items.title: Amazon is returning to China after it was 'killed' by JD.com
items.title_zh: 亚马逊在被京东“杀死”后重返中国
items.summary: Amazon is re-entering China with a new strategy, focusing on logistics to support Chinese sellers exporting globally, particularly to the US.  After its previous marketplace failed against local giants, the e-commerce giant has opened a Shenzhen hub offering storage, customs, and shipping services. This move aims to cut seller costs and compete with rivals like Temu and Shein.

items.title: Opposition kills bill in Lok Sabha, it's NDA govt's first legislative defeat
items.title_zh: 反对派在Lok Sabha杀死了法案，这是NDA政府首次立法失败

items.title: Bogus Nashik astrologer Ashok Kharat’s aide, wife killed in car crash
items.title_zh: 假Nashik占星家Ashok Kharat的助手，妻子在车祸中丧生
items.summary: Jailed astrologer Ashok Kharat's close associate, Jitendra Shelke, and his wife died in a road accident on the Samruddhi highway. Their son was critically injured. Opposition leaders and activists have raised suspicions about the incident, citing Shelke's key position in Kharat's organization and his recent questioning by the ED.

items.title: 'Bhooth Bangla' opens to strong Rs 23 crore worldwide debut; ends 'Dhurandhar 2' reign
items.title_zh: “Bhooth Bangla”在全球首次亮相，获得了23亿卢比的收入；结束了“Dhurandhar 2”的统治
items.summary: Akshay Kumar's 'Bhooth Bangla' has stormed the box office, securing a massive Rs 23.90 crore worldwide debut on its opening day. This impressive performance has dethroned Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' after its four-week reign. The horror-comedy's strong opening positions it among Akshay Kumar's top post-pandemic releases.

items.title: Microsoft’s & Apple’s coding tools will be ‘dead soon,': Creator of Antrophic's AI coding tool
items.title_zh: 微软和苹果的编码工具将“很快死亡” ： Antrophic的人工智能编码工具的创造者
items.summary: Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, predicts traditional coding tools like VS Code and Xcode will soon be obsolete. He believes AI agents will soon handle entire development workflows, rendering current IDEs unnecessary. This shift will redefine software engineers into 'builders' who orchestrate AI, requiring adaptability and early experimentation from professionals.

items.title: IAF fighter jet’s ‘hard landing’ shuts Pune runway, affects scores of night flights
items.title_zh: 印度空军战斗机的“硬着陆”关闭了浦那跑道，影响了数十次夜间飞行
items.summary: Pune airport's runway closure following an Indian Air Force aircraft incident caused significant flight disruptions Monday night. An IAF Sukhoi 30 MKI reportedly experienced an undercarriage failure during a hard landing, blocking the runway. Over 30 flights were diverted or cancelled, leaving passengers facing confusion and delays. Efforts are underway to clear the runway.

items.title: "7 Claims In 1 Hour, All False": Iran After Trump's 'Hormuz Blockade' Post
items.title_zh: “1小时内7次索赔，全是假的” ：特朗普“霍尔木兹封锁”帖子后的伊朗
items.summary: The Strait of Hormuz is the chokepoint that carries around a fifth of the world's oil supply.

items.title: "We Came In Fast And Hot": Artemis Astronauts On Re-Entry At 48,021 Kmph
items.title_zh: “我们来得又快又热” ：阿尔忒弥斯宇航员以每小时48,021公里的速度重返大气层
items.summary: They returned into Earth's atmosphere at roughly 32 times the speed of sound

items.title: Trump Says Will Bring Iran Uranium "Back Home To US", Tehran Responds
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示将把伊朗铀“带回家” ，德黑兰回应
items.summary: Trump's comments elaborated on his claim that Iran had agreed to hand over its enriched uranium.

items.title: Meta To Lay Off Around 8,000 Employees By Next Month: Report
items.title_zh: Meta将在下个月裁员约8,000人：报告
items.summary: The company is planning further layoffs in the second half of the year, the three sources said

items.title: Vijay Steps Up Perambur Campaign, Bets On Youth, Women And Proxy Outreach
items.title_zh: Vijay加大Perambur运动的力度，押注青年、妇女和代理外展
items.summary: Vijay commands a cult following among youth and children, many of them first-time voters

items.title: US Grants Month-Long Sanctions Waiver On Purchases Of Russian Oil Amid Iran War
items.title_zh: 美国授予在伊朗战争期间购买俄罗斯石油的为期一个月的制裁豁免
items.summary: Oil prices have since surged, squeezing countries and especially those dependent on energy exports from the region.

items.title: "No Complaints" Received Through Internal Channels, Says TCS Amid Nashik Probe
items.title_zh: TCS在Nashik Probe中表示，通过内部渠道收到“无投诉”
items.summary: TCS announced an oversight panel and engagement of external entities in its internal probe.

items.title: Iran Says It Will Shut Hormuz If US Blockade Continues: Top Developments
items.title_zh: 伊朗表示，如果美国继续封锁，它将关闭霍尔木兹：主要事态发展
items.summary: Iranian speaker said that passage through the waterway would depend on authorisation from Iran.

items.title: Top Zelensky Aide Meets, Ajit Doval, S Jaishankar To Discuss Path To Peace
items.title_zh: 顶级Zelensky助手与Ajit Doval ， S Jaishankar会面，讨论通往和平的道路
items.summary: Rustem Umerov, considered close to President Zelensky, met Ajit Doval in New Delhi, Friday.

items.title: Pune Airport Runway Shut After Air Force Aircraft's 'Hard Landing'
items.title_zh: 空军飞机“硬着陆”后浦那机场跑道关闭
items.summary: A police officer said an IAF aircraft experienced a "hard landing" but refused to give details.

items.title: イラン側「米海上封鎖なら自由通航認めず」数日以内に協議か
items.title_zh: 伊朗方面“如果美国海军封锁，将不允许自由通过”几天内讨论
items.summary: ホルムズ海峡をめぐり、イランのアラグチ外相は条件をつけた上で「完全に開放される」とSNSで発表しましたが、その後、イラン議会のガリバフ議長が、アメリカによる海上封鎖が解除されないかぎり、船舶の自由な通航を認めないと強調しました。こうした中、アメリカとイランの次の対面協議について、ここ数日以内に行われるとの見方が強まっています。

items.title: 京都 男児遺体遺棄事件 自宅と小学校の間のトイレを現場検証
items.title_zh: 在京都发现男孩遗弃尸体时，对房源和小学之间的厕所进行现场检查
items.summary: 京都府南丹市の山林に小学生の息子の遺体を遺棄したとして37歳の父親が逮捕された事件で、警察は18日、自宅と小学校の間にあるトイレで現場検証を行っています。警察は遺体が遺棄された場所のひとつである可能性があるとみて詳しく調べることにしています。

items.title: “ゾンビたばこ”密輸した疑いで逮捕 過去最多4キロ余押収
items.title_zh: 涉嫌走私“僵尸香烟”被捕，过去没收4公斤以上
items.summary: 幻覚作用があり、「ゾンビたばこ」とも呼ばれる指定薬物「エトミデート」4キロ余りをタイから密輸したなどとして、台湾に住む50歳の容疑者が逮捕されました。押収した「エトミデート」の量は過去最多だということで、警視庁は、若者を中心に国内でも乱用が広がっているとみて詳しく調べています。調べに対し、容疑を否認しているということです。

items.title: 東京のIT関連会社役員とみられる遺体 峠に遺棄か 警視庁が捜索
items.title_zh: 大都会警察局搜查了一名据信是东京IT附属机构的警官的尸体
items.summary: 去年から行方が分からなくなっている東京のIT関連会社の50代の男性役員とみられる遺体を遺棄したとして、会社の代表を務める49歳の容疑者が逮捕された事件で、遺体が東京と神奈川の県境にある峠に遺棄された可能性があることが分かり、警視庁は18日朝から周辺を捜索しています。

items.title: NYダウ 一時1100ドル上昇 NY原油市場 先物価格80ドル台に急落
items.title_zh: 纽约道琼斯指数单次上涨1100美元，在纽约原油市场暴跌至80美元期货
items.summary: 17日のニューヨーク株式市場では、買い注文が広がり、ダウ平均株価は前日の終値から一時、1100ドルを超える値上がりとなりました。イランのアラグチ外相が、ホルムズ海峡をめぐり、開放すると表明したことなどを受けて、原油の供給不安が和らいだことが背景にあります。

items.title: Ｇ7重要鉱物会議 供給網の多角化に向けた取り組み加速を確認
items.title_zh: 确认加快推进七国集团重要矿产会议供应网络多元化
items.summary: レアアースをはじめとした重要鉱物をめぐる課題について話し合うG7＝主要7か国の財務相などによる会議が日本時間の18日朝にアメリカで開かれ、圧倒的なシェアを占める中国を念頭にサプライチェーンの多角化に向けた取り組みを加速させていくことを確認しました。

items.title: カブス 鈴木誠也 先制タイムリーなど複数安打で勝利に貢献
items.title_zh: 小熊队的铃木诚（ Makoto Suzuki ）以先发制人和及时等多次命中为胜利做出了贡献
items.summary: 大リーグ、カブスの鈴木誠也選手はメッツ戦で千賀滉大投手から先制タイムリーを打つなど、2試合連続の複数安打をマークし、勝利に貢献しました。

items.title: Investigators question accomplice of notorious 'drug kingpin' in Philippines
items.title_zh: 调查人员质疑菲律宾臭名昭著的“毒枭”同谋
items.summary: Investigators said Saturday they have questioned an accomplice and nephew of notorious drug trafficker Park Wang-yeol in the Philippines. Nine people, including a prosecutor, were sent to a correctional facility in Manila on Sunday to question the nephew jailed there and returned earlier Saturday, according to an investigation task force comprising eight agencies, including the prosecution, police and National Intelligence Service. The nephew, known as the "blue whale," is suspected of working as Park's accomplice to smuggle drugs into Korea and distribute them. Using material gathered from questioning the nephew and other accomplices jailed in the Philippines, the task force plans to reinforce the evidence to support the charges against Park. The 48-year-old Park, who has been serving a 60-year prison sentence in the Philippines for the murders of three Koreans in 2016, was temporarily repatriated last month to be investigated on drug trafficking charges. In total, he is accused of smuggling, distributing and selling or attempting to sell 13.1 billion won ($8.9 million) worth of drugs in

items.title: Wolf instinct: how an escaped South Korean zoo wolf survived nine days on carcasses
items.title_zh: 狼的本能：一只逃脱的韩国动物园狼如何在尸体上生存了九天
items.summary: A wolf that escaped from a zoo in Daejeon was captured alive nine days later after surviving in the wild by feeding on animal carcasses and drinking from nearby water sources, according to the authorities. According to Daejeon city officials on April 17, the wolf, named Neukgu, was captured at around 12:44 a.m. near the Anyeong Interchange on the Daejeon Southern Ring Expressway, about 1 kilometer from Daejeon O-World, from where it had escaped. The search intensified after a citizen reported spotting the animal near a hiking trail by Ppuri Park on the afternoon of April 16. The authorities initially mistook another animal for the wolf but later identified its location using a drone at around 11:45 p.m. A team of veterinarians and zookeepers approached the wolf cautiously and fired a tranquilizer dart at 12:39 a.m. The dart struck the wolf in the thigh, and after staggering for about five minutes, the animal fell into a nearby waterway and was captured. An official said, “The wolf was not moving much when we found it, which allowed us to hit it with the tranquilizer dart,” adding tha

items.title: Idol’s brother probed over alleged assault, photo blackmail of streamer
items.title_zh: 偶像的兄弟对涉嫌殴打事件进行了调查，对流媒体进行了照片敲诈
items.summary: A man in his 30s, identified only by his surname Kim, is under police investigation on suspicion of sexually assaulting a female online streamer and threatening to distribute intimate images of her, authorities said. According to police on April 17, the Seoul Gangnam Police Station is investigating Kim — reportedly known as the brother of a member of a well-known girl group — along with an acquaintance, identified as A, on charges including indecent assault and violations of the sexual violence punishment law involving threats using illicitly obtained images and distribution of such material. The victim, identified as B, said in her complaint that Kim received photos of her body, shared them with a third party, and then threatened to distribute the images. Police said they had applied for an arrest warrant for Kim the same day. The case began on April 12 during an event hosted by B on the online streaming platform SOOP. During the broadcast, B offered prizes such as a dinner date and selfies through a lottery-style promotion, with each entry costing about 10,000 won ($7.30). Kim rep

items.title: PPP nominates incumbent Oh Se-hoon as candidate for Seoul mayor
items.title_zh: PPP提名现任市长吴世勋为首尔市长候选人
items.summary: The main opposition People Power Party (PPP) said Saturday it has chosen incumbent Seoul Mayor Oh Se-hoon as its candidate for the mayoral race in the June 3 local elections. Oh beat PPP Rep. Park Soo-min and former PPP Rep. Yun Hee-suk in a three-way primary, Rep. Park Duk-hyum, the party's nomination committee chief, said, setting him up against candidate Chong Won-o of the ruling Democratic Party of Korea in the mayoral election. Oh will be aiming to win his third consecutive and fifth non-consecutive term as mayor of Seoul. Born in 1961, Oh entered politics in 2000 after winning a parliamentary seat in Seoul's Gangnam district. Though he announced his retirement from politics four years later, he made a comeback in 2006 by becoming the first Seoul mayor in their 40s. Oh won reelection but resigned after staking his mayoralty on the results of a referendum on free school meals in 2011. After 10 years of absence from the political scene, he returned to City Hall by winning the April 2021 by-election and won reelection in 2022.

items.title: Talk To Me In Korean aims to help learners overcome language acquisition difficulties
items.title_zh: 韩语与我交谈旨在帮助学习者克服语言习得困难
items.summary: While Korea continues to be seen as a global cultural hotspot — fueled by the high-gloss exports of K-pop and cinema — a much quieter, more mundane friction persists on the ground. For the growing global community living on the peninsula, the Korean language can sometimes feel like an interruption to a private conversation, a knock on the door that reminds the listener of their outsider status. As the country matures into a global hub, the struggle to move from basic phrases to working fluency remains a crucial challenge for foreign residents who hope to stay. Most learners find that the hardest part of learning Korean comes after the beginner stage. Reading Hangeul, ordering coffee and introducing oneself can come relatively quickly. But moving beyond functional Korean — toward the kind used in workplaces, friendships and everyday life — often takes years of repetition, frustration and persistence. That long middle stretch is where many learners lose momentum. It is also where platforms like Talk To Me In Korean (TTMIK), founded by Sun Hyun-woo, have found a loyal global audie

items.title: Semiconductor programs overtake medical schools in Korea's college admissions race
items.title_zh: 半导体项目在韩国大学入学竞赛中超越医学院
items.summary: Semiconductor programs at Korean universities have overtaken medical schools in admissions competition, highlighting the rapid rise of employment-guaranteed programs as a preferred path for top-performing students. According to Jongro Academy, one of Korea’s largest college preparatory institutes, contract-based semiconductor programs affiliated with major firms such as Samsung Electronics and SK hynix posted an average competition rate of 7.16 to 1 in the 2026 regular admissions cycle. By institution, Yonsei University’s System Semiconductor Engineering program, tied to Samsung Electronics, drew 187 applicants for 32 slots, yielding a competition rate of 5.84 to 1. Sungkyunkwan University’s Semiconductor Systems Engineering Division, also partnered with Samsung Electronics, recorded 80 applicants for 15 places, or 5.33 to 1. Programs linked to SK hynix saw even stronger demand. Hanyang University’s Department of Semiconductor Engineering topped the list with a competition rate of 11.8 to 1, followed by Sogang University’s System Semiconductor Engineering program at 9 to 1 and

items.title: Saudi, US foreign ministers discuss Hormuz, Lebanon ceasefire
items.title_zh: 沙特、美国外长讨论黎巴嫩霍尔木兹停火
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi Foreign Minister Prince Faisal bin Farhan held a phone call with US Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss regional developments on Friday.The call focused on efforts to ensure the continued opening of the Strait of Hormuz and to sustain the ceasefire in Lebanon.Both sides also emphasized the importance of dialogue and diplomatic solutions to enhance security and stability across the region.

items.title: Saudi Arabia amends anti-money laundering law, imposes travel ban on offenders
items.title_zh: 沙特阿拉伯修订反洗钱法，对违法者实施旅行禁令
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi Arabia’s Cabinet has approved amendments to the anti-money laundering law, including new provisions imposing travel bans on convicted offenders and expanding asset confiscation measures.Under the updated Article 28, Saudi nationals sentenced to prison for money laundering will be banned from traveling abroad for a period equal to their prison term.Non-Saudi offenders will be deported after serving their sentence and barred from re-entering the Kingdom, except for Hajj or Umrah in accordance with regulations.The amendments also reinforce financial penalties. Article 33 stipulates that courts must order the confiscation of laundered funds, proceeds, and related assets upon conviction. If illicit funds are mixed with legitimate assets, an equivalent value will be seized.Courts may also confiscate other assets belonging to the offender that are disproportionate to their legitimate income if proven to be derived from criminal activity, unless lawful origin is established.The updated provisions allow courts to confiscate assets regardless of whether they are held by the offender or a third party, provided it is proven they are linked to the crime. However, assets will not be seized if the owner can demonstrate they were acquired in good faith and for fair value.Courts are also empowered to invalidate or suspend transactions or activities that could hinder authorities from recovering assets subject to confiscation.A new Article 49 bis assigns the Permanent Committee for Combating Money Laundering the responsibility of developing and updating risk-based national policies, assessing threats — including those linked to high-risk countries — and aligning with international standards. The Saudi Central Bank governor will issue the committee’s internal regulations.The amendments also include the removal of the term “non-profit organizations” from several articles of the law.

items.title: Commerce Ministry blocks online store over use of national symbols in ads
items.title_zh: 商务部禁止在线商店在广告中使用国家符号
items.summary: RIYADH — The Ministry of Commerce has blocked an online store after it was found using images of national symbols and state officials to promote its products, in violation of regulations.The ministry said the store exploited such images in commercial advertising, breaching rules that prohibit the use of official symbols and figures in business activities.It noted that a circular issued under a royal directive bans the use of the state emblem, as well as images and names of officials, in commercial transactions, publications, and promotional materials.The ministry stressed that such practices constitute a clear violation of regulations.It added that inspection campaigns on online stores are ongoing to detect similar violations and take legal action against offenders.

items.title: Inside the 10 routes carrying Hajj pilgrims to Makkah
items.title_zh: 前往麦加朝觐的10条路线
items.summary: MAKKAH — With millions of pilgrims arriving annually to perform Hajj, Saudi Arabia’s Roads General Authority (RGA) has developed an extensive road network linking the Kingdom with neighboring countries to facilitate smoother journeys to the Two Holy Mosques.While pilgrims have access to railways, ports, and airports, the Kingdom has also established 10 main overland routes designed to ensure efficient and safe travel from across the Arabian Peninsula.The routes are built in line with international standards and are equipped with integrated safety systems to maintain traffic flow and safeguard pilgrims.From the east, pilgrims from Gulf countries are served by multiple routes. Travelers from Kuwait use two main roads — one stretching 1,473 km via Al-Khafji, Nairyah, Riyadh, and Makkah, and another spanning 1,277 km through Al-Riggae, Hafr Al-Batin, Al-Majma’ah, and Makkah.Pilgrims from the UAE follow a 1,514-km route via Al-Batha, Salwa, Al-Hofuf, Riyadh, Taif, and Makkah, while those from Qatar travel along a 1,385-km route passing through Salwa, Al-Hofuf, Riyadh, Taif, and Makkah.Pilgrims from Bahrain enter via the King Fahd Causeway into Al-Khobar, then continue through Riyadh and Taif to Makkah, covering around 1,320 km.From the north, pilgrims from Jordan use two routes: one beginning at Halat Ammar Port through Tabuk and Madinah to Makkah (1,219 km), and another from Al-Haditha through Al-Qurayyat, Sakaka, and Madinah (1,545 km).Pilgrims from Iraq travel a 1,579-km route from Jadidat Arar through Arar, Sakaka, and Madinah to Makkah.From the south, pilgrims from Yemen follow a 1,372-km route via Al-Wadiah, Najran, and Abha to Makkah.Those coming from Oman travel the longest route — about 2,150 km — crossing the Rub' al Khali via Umm Al Zumoul, Al-Batha, Salwa, Al-Hofuf, and onward to Makkah.Ahead of the Hajj season, the RGA has conducted extensive inspections and maintenance work across the road network, including resurfacing, shoulder repairs, sand removal, drainage cleaning, and checks on barriers and signage to ensure the highest safety standards.

items.title: Rain expected in Riyadh through Sunday
items.title_zh: 利雅得预计下雨至周日
items.summary: RIYADH — Light to moderate rainfall is expected across the Riyadh region starting today and continuing through Sunday, according to the National Center for Meteorology.The forecast covers Riyadh city and several governorates, including Al-Kharj, Al-Dalam, Al-Muzahimiyah, Al-Qiddiya, Diriyah, Al-Rayn, Al-Hariq, Rumah, Hotat Bani Tamim, Afif, Al-Dawadmi, Al-Quwayiyah, Al-Ghat, Al-Zulfi, Al-Majmaah, Shaqra, Thadiq, Huraymila, Durma, and Marat.Civil Defense urged residents to exercise caution and follow safety instructions during the weather conditions.

items.title: Al-Jadaan: No quick recovery from Iran war
items.title_zh: Al-Jadaan ：伊朗战争没有迅速恢复
items.summary: WASHINGTON — Saudi Finance Minister Mohammed Al-Jadaan said Gulf countries will not allow the Iran war to derail long-term reform plans and infrastructure investments.Speaking on the sidelines of the Spring Meetings of the International Monetary Fund and World Bank in Washington, Al-Jadaan said Saudi Arabia, the UAE, and Qatar are continuing to sign investment agreements despite regional tensions.He stressed that Saudi Arabia has not been significantly affected by the conflict, noting that air raid sirens were activated only twice and that daily life continued as normal across the Kingdom.Al-Jadaan highlighted the resilience of the Saudi economy and the long-term value of its strategic investments, citing the East-West oil pipeline as a key example.He noted that the pipeline, built decades ago, has proven its importance by helping offset supply disruptions caused by the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, with a capacity to transport around 5 million barrels per day.“Anyone who expects a quick recovery from the Iran war — even if military operations stop — should reconsider,” Al-Jadaan said, warning that economic recovery may take longer than anticipated.He added that any future agreement must be acceptable to all parties, calling on countries to prepare their populations and economies for a prolonged recovery period.

items.title: Saudi grant supports irrigation, food security in Pakistan
items.title_zh: 沙特赠款支持巴基斯坦的灌溉和粮食安全
items.summary: ISLAMABAD — Saudi Arabia has provided a grant to Pakistan to support the “Green Pakistan” initiative, aimed at enhancing irrigation systems, boosting agricultural productivity, and strengthening food security.The grant was announced during an official visit by a Saudi delegation, led by Deputy Minister for Agriculture at the Ministry of Environment, Water and Agriculture Sulaiman Al-Khateeb, as part of the Kingdom’s strategy to support Pakistan and deepen bilateral cooperation in sustainable development.The project covers an area of 500 hectares and includes the provision of 10 central pivot irrigation systems, along with supporting equipment such as fertilization units, generators, and power engines.It also includes training programs for Pakistani specialists on system operation and management, benefiting agricultural communities in Punjab and the Bahawalpur region.The initiative aims to improve water-use efficiency in agriculture, particularly in semi-arid areas, expand irrigated land, increase agricultural output both in quantity and quality, and diversify crop production while preserving natural resources.Saudi Arabia said the project will also contribute to job creation and improved living conditions in beneficiary areas.The move comes as Saudi Arabia and Pakistan seek to expand economic cooperation following a recently signed framework agreement, focusing on priority sectors including energy, industry, mining, information technology, tourism, agriculture, and food security, as well as advancing plans for electricity interconnection between the two countries.

items.title: Probe ongoing into Saudi tourist’s death in Istanbul hotel
items.title_zh: 正在调查沙特游客在伊斯坦布尔酒店死亡事件
items.summary: ISTANBUL — Investigations are ongoing into the death of a Saudi citizen in Istanbul after he reportedly suffered suspected food poisoning following a meal at a hotel restaurant, Okaz newspaper reported.The deceased, identified as 82-year-old Saeed Suwailam Al-Mohammadi, had traveled to Istanbul on a tourist trip with his wife and was staying at a hotel in the Sisli district.Sources said Turkish authorities have collected samples of meat and food from the restaurant where he ate, while also verifying hygiene conditions at the hotel prior to the incident.The investigation has included the restaurant manager, chef, and a hotel official, who were later released under judicial supervision.Preliminary findings indicate that Al-Mohammadi fell ill a day after eating, experiencing fatigue and persistent vomiting. He sought medical treatment at a hospital and was later discharged, but his condition deteriorated.Emergency services were called to his hotel, where he was found dead.Investigators suspect food poisoning as a likely cause, with early indications pointing to a chicken meal consumed a day before his death.Sources said the time between consuming the meal and the onset of symptoms ranged between 20 and 23 hours.Authorities have also reviewed surveillance footage from the restaurant, which reportedly captured the victim during the meal.The investigation remains ongoing, with food poisoning considered one of the primary lines of inquiry.

items.title: ZATCA foils 29kg cocaine smuggling attempt at Jeddah port
items.title_zh: ZATCA在吉达港企图走私29公斤可卡因
items.summary: JEDDAH — The Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority (ZATCA) has foiled an attempt to smuggle 29.1 kilograms of cocaine hidden inside a shipment arriving at Jeddah Islamic Port.ZATCA spokesperson Hammoud Al-Harbi said the drugs were discovered during customs inspection procedures using advanced security technologies and inspection methods.The cocaine was concealed inside an air conditioning unit within the container, he added.Al-Harbi stressed that ZATCA continues to strengthen customs control across all entry points to protect society and prevent smuggling attempts, in line with its strategy to enhance security and public safety.He noted that the authority works in coordination with the General Directorate of Narcotics Control to combat drug trafficking.ZATCA urged the public to report smuggling activities through its dedicated hotline (1910), email, or international contact number, assuring confidentiality and offering financial rewards for verified information.

items.title: Shoura Council speaker attends IPU General Assembly in Istanbul
items.title_zh: 舒拉理事会发言人出席在伊斯坦布尔举行的议会联盟大会
items.summary: RIYADH — The 152nd General Assembly of the Inter-Parliamentary Union (IPU) and its associated meetings commenced in Istanbul on Thursday. The assembly brought together speakers of parliaments from around the world, along with parliamentarians and representatives of international organizations.Saudi Arabia's delegation attending the session is headed by Shoura Council Speaker Sheikh Abdullah Al-Sheikh. The delegation includes Secretary General of the Shoura Council Mohammed Al-Mutairi; Shoura Council member and member of the Executive Committee of the Arab Inter-Parliamentary Union Dr. Abdulaziz Al-Muhanna; and Shoura Council members and IPU members Maj. Gen. Dr. Abdulrahman Al-Harbi, Waleed Abdulshakoor, Raida Abu Nayan, Dr. Reema Al-Yahya, Ali Al-Qahtani, and Abdullah Al-Madi. Meanwhile, Sheikh Al-Sheikh met with Speaker of the Turkish Parliament Numan Kurtulmus on the sidelines of the 152nd Assembly of the IPU, hosted by Türkiye. During the meeting, they reviewed topics on the agenda of the Assembly, parliamentary relations, and ways to strengthen them. They also discussed issues of common interest between the two countries.
